name: autonexus
description: Autonomous iteration engine with Obsidian knowledge backbone. 26 commands, 60+ autonomous agents. Swarm intelligence (queen hierarchy, 5 topologies, 5 consensus algorithms), SPARC 5-phase development, ReasoningBank self-learning, claims-based governance, stream chaining, three-tier routing, ML engineering. Full Agile sprint lifecycle, workflow composition, event-driven hooks, canvas visualization. Every iteration reads from and writes to Obsidian.
